raw.official description: Strike enemies to increase movement and attack speed.
raw.ability details: * Stacks additively, up to 5 times. All stacks are lost at once when the duration expires. * Activated by Palatine Fang, Projected Edge, Whirlwind Dash, Soaring Slice, Sundering Blade, [[File:Quick melee.png|sub|link=Melee#Quick Melee|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Melee#Quick Melee|Quick Melee]] and [[Environmental kill|environmental eliminations]]. * Does not trigger from hitting [[deployables]], including [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]. * Also speeds up the cast time of ''Could not find 'Projected Edge' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. * Unlike [[File:Passive-Zarya.png|sub|link=Zarya#Energy|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Energy|Energy]], Onslaught does not reset to 0 upon death. [[File:Ability-mercy5.png|sub|link=Mercy#Resurrect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mercy#Resurrect|Resurrect]] restores the number of Onslaught stacks accrued with the remaining time prior to being eliminated. The timer still ticks while not alive.

shot_type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.official description: Whirlwind Dash continues to spin, hitting 3 more times for 30 damage in a wide area.
raw.ability details:
* First hit happens after 0.3 second delay and the following two after 0.45 second delay each.
* The spin can be canceled by pressing primary fire.
* Hits from Raging Storm also grant Onslaught stacks.

raw.official description: Onslaught can stack 3 more times, increasing attack speed by 5% and movement speed by 3% per stack.

raw.heal: 40% of damage dealt
raw.ability details:
* Normal Overhead Strike results in 48 healing without damage modifications.
* Sundering Blade at level 1 results in 20 to 40 healing, at level 2 results in 40 to 80 healing, and at level 3 results in 80 to 160 healing.
* Healing is not reduced by the global healing reduction passive.

heal.raw: 40% of damage dealt

raw.official description: Last player to land a killing blow on you becomes a target. Eliminate the target to gain 150 overhealth and reset cooldowns.
raw.ability details:
* Overhealth decays over 6 seconds at the end of the duration.
* ''Removed in Season 1: Conquest''

abilities.name: Whirlwind Dash
shot_type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.official description: Rush forward into a circular slash.
raw.ability details: * The blade spin has a small knockback effect. * The rush forward has a large narrow knockback effect, similar to being indirectly hit by Reinhardt's [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]]. * The rush always moves horizontally, and Vendetta is not affected by gravity while rushing. * Stacks additionally with other movement speed buffs. Does not count toward global movement speed cap. * If Whirlwind Dash collides with [[File:Rocket_punch.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Rocket Punch|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Rocket Punch|Rocket Punch]], [[File:Shield Bash.png|sub|link=Brigitte#Shield Bash|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Brigitte#Shield Bash|Shield Bash]], a charging [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]], [[File:Ability-reinhardt3.png|sub|link=Reinhardt#Charge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reinhardt#Charge|Charge]], or another Vendetta using ''Could not find 'Whirlwind Dash' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'', both participants get knocked down for 1.7 seconds.

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-dva7.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Projectile|Projectile ]] Projectile
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Hurl your sword in the direction you are facing and then fly to it.
raw.ability details:
* Vendetta respawns with this ability on cooldown.
* The next attack after Soaring Slice and before touching the ground will become an Overhead strike.
** Triggering the Overhead strike allows Vendetta to change directions while midair.
* Cancelling immediately with jump (or aiming at the ground) allows Vendetta to get a free Overhead strike without changing position much, allowing her to combo two Overhead strikes on the same target.

abilities.name: Palatine Fang

raw.shot type:
[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Hard-light greatsword. Combo swings to end with a destructive overhead slash.
raw.ability details: * Every third swing with the Palatine Fang within the combo threshold will become an Overhead Strike. ** Overhead Strike damage is critical. ** If airborne, including just jumping from the ground, Overhead Strike will cause Vendetta to leap forward about 4.6 meters. *** After the leap, Vendetta will fall with increased gravity. ** If the enemy is airborn when hit with the overhead slash, they will fall with increased gravity.'"`UNIQ--ref-0000006E-QINU`"' ** Overhead strike can be canceled by using ''Could not find 'Warding Stance' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.''. * Swing timings are as follows: ** 1st swing: 0.4s startup + 0.28s recovery ** 2nd swing: 0.2s startup + 0.3s recovery ** Overhead: 0.64s startup + 0.74s recovery * All abilities, except [[File:Quick melee.png|sub|link=Melee#Quick Melee|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Melee#Quick Melee|Quick Melee]], can be used to cancel recovery animation.

abilities.name: Projected Edge

raw.official description: Available when Warding Stance is active. Consume energy to fire a wide projectile.
raw.ability details: * Causes Vendetta to stop blocking for approximately 1.1 seconds. * [[File:Vendetta_onslaught_1.png|sub|link=Vendetta#Onslaught|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Onslaught|Onslaught]] speeds up the cast time of Projected Edge. * The projectile has a 0.2 meter inner radius for collision against barriers and terrain-like deployables, such as [[File:Tree_of_Life_Icon.png|sub|link=Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Lifeweaver#Tree of Life|Tree of Life]]. If only the outer edge of the projectile hits, it will not be blocked and it damages the deployable. ** Always pierces heroes and other kinds of deployables. * Recovery time for ''Could not find 'Whirlwind Dash' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' and ''Could not find 'Soaring Slice' in 'Abilities'. Check spelling and see [[Help:Cargo]] if the issue persists.'' is lower at 0.25 seconds, instead of the usual 0.35 seconds

abilities.name: Warding Stance

raw.official description: Block with your sword, reducing frontal damage and deflecting melee attacks. Blocking damage depletes energy.
raw.ability details: * Can block 250 damage maximum, which chunks 62.5hp off your health bar * Only depletes energy when taking damage, but energy does not regenerate while Warding Stance is up. * Energy cost is based on the raw damage of the attack, before any damage reductions. * Must have at least 30% energy remaining to start blocking, however dropping below 30% while already blocking will not end the ability. * When an instance of damage reduces energy to zero, it will still be reduced in full. * It takes ~11.1 seconds for Warding Stance to fully recharge. * The lines in the energy bar correspond to 30% and 60% of max energy. * Using any abilities, except [[File:Quick melee.png|sub|link=Melee#Quick Melee|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Melee#Quick Melee|Quick Melee]], will interrupt blocking.

abilities.name: Sundering Blade
shot_type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect

raw.shot type:
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
raw.official description: Cleave through most defenses, dealing severe damage to enemies in front of you.
raw.ability details: * Pierces barriers, ignores damage reduction, destroys overhealth before dealing damage, and deals full damage to Bubbled ([[File:Ability-zarya2.png|sub|link=Zarya#Particle Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Particle Barrier|Particle/Projected Barrier]] and [[File:Adaptive_Barrier.png|sub|link=Wrecking Ball#Adaptive Barrier|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Wrecking Ball#Adaptive Barrier|Adaptive Barrier]]) enemies if the Bubble is destroyed. * Deals 50% of deployables' max health as damage, plus the extra damage charged by the ultimate. * The charge progresses a stage every 1 second, up to stage 3. Each stage increases the damage and area of the slash. ** Once stage 3 has been reached, spending more time charging has no benefit. ** Will automatically fire when 4 seconds have expired. * Vendetta is not affected by gravity while charging. ** When complete, Vendetta will fall faster than gravity and the cleave will hit the ground. * Secondary fire provides a small camera angle change. * Sundering Blade counts as an Overhead Strike for cases like Siphoning Strike that grant lifesteal.
